{{CargoClone
|name=Rikugo
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=151
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} ART +50
|gene3=Resolver: W-tads extracted +9
|gene4=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Angel Minion Skin HP +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Angel Minion Skin HP +50%
|}}
